ModMetaData.name: Fianchetto Variation: Human Edition
ModMetaData.author: AEWV
ModMetaData.description: Standalone human-usable port of the Fianchetto arsenal. Adds the Milian Conductor Rod, Strike drone: Malkuth / Gevurah / Keter, and related abilities for ordinary humanlike pawns without requiring Milira Race, Ancot Library, or the original workshop addon. Includes CE patch.
